channel.title: Document-Sharing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Document-Sharing on Pi Stack

item.title: Papermark vs Filestash vs Pingvin Share: Best Self-Hosted Document Sharing 2026
item.description: Sharing documents and files externally is a daily requirement for teams, freelancers, and organizations. Cloud services like DocSend, WeTransfer, and Google Drive dominate this space, but they come with privacy concerns, vendor lock-in, and recurring subscription costs. Self-hosted alternatives give you full control over your data, branding, and access policies — without handing your documents to a third party.
